name: Lawyer Fees for Sandy Occupational Illness Cases

mainEntity.name: Costs of hiring a workers' comp lawyer for occupational illness in Sandy, UT?
mainEntity.text: Costs of hiring a workers' comp lawyer for occupational illness in Sandy, UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah contingency fees for occupational illness lawyers cap at 20% of settlement for disputed claims, 15% for undisputed. No upfront costs; fees from award only.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Court-approved fees ensure fairness. Sandy attorneys advance case costs (e.g., expert fees), recouped from settlement. Compare rates across Murray to Draper; higher complexity justifies 20%. Avoid low-fee traps leading to poor settlements. Transparent firms disclose total recovery impact.[5]

description: Utah contingency fees for occupational illness lawyers cap at 20% of settlement for disputed claims, 15% for undisputed. No upfront costs; fees from award only.
